% coursemeta.tex - fixture for the metadata auto-vivification smoke build.
% office-hours is NOT a predefined key: it exercises course-metadata.sty's
% catch-all, which must absorb it and mint \GetOfficeHours.  \MetaAllowCustomKeys
% marks the custom key as intentional so the build stays quiet (log-only note).
\MetaAllowCustomKeys
\metasetup{
	institution     = {Smoke Test University},
	instructor      = {Test Instructor},
	course-subject  = Math,
	course-number   = 101,
	office-hours    = {MWF 2-3pm CMOFFICEHOURSMARK},
}
